creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmmm... I have a geoserver running in production. Furthermore, I just did a pkg install of geoserver-2.23.2 on a machine that hasn't seen geoserver before and it worked out of the box. Installation worked, starting the service worked and the web server responds. It's also using java 17.

Any chance that you're using the quarterly repository? That still has geoserver-2.23.1 without the _1 PORTREVISION lacking the fix (bug #272413).
